rule.name: Remove NNS from 'gives' when it's a verb
first/last thing does not need an article
hat in hand => no determiner required
at + nouns that require no determiner
beyond + nouns that require no determiner
beyond + nouns that require no determiner
under + nouns that require no determiner
with + nouns that require no determiner
without + nouns that require no determiner
kind of + adj/adv => no determiner required
in as noun/preposition + the -> in as preposition
in as noun/preposition + uncountable noun -> in as preposition
the/these... + numeral + are (noun/verb) -> the... + numer + are (verb)
be + verb progressive/jj + noun countable => verb progressive
SENT_START + the + nn/jj + verb sing => nn
remove DT from 'an' used instead of 'and'
Uppercase word/no tag + uppercase word -> NNP
I as Roman number in king names
DT|JJ + JJR + JJ/NN -> JJ + CC + JJ
JJ + JJ/NN > NN + VB/NN > VB + NOUNPHRASE
DT|JJ + JJ + end of phrase -> NN
verb/noun and verb/noun -> verb and verb
NNP for Spanish geo names containing 'del'
NNP for Hispanic city names containing 'de la'
companies: verb to noun if preceded by adj
have palm trees - palm is a noun
Plural determiners + noun plur/vb sg => noun plur
Prepositional quantifiers + noun plur/vb sg = >noun plur
determiner + adj + noun/adj + noun + verbn't => noun
determiner + adj + noun/adj + noun + verb => noun
to + noun/verb > verb + and/or + noun/verb > verb
past participle + to + noun/verb > verb + preposition
Proper noun: Christ lag in Todesbanden
Proper noun: Conference of Specialised Ministers
Ignore spelling of superscripted units of measure
Ignore spelling of Hispanic names containing 'de'
Ignore spelling of Hispanic names containing 'del'
Ignore spelling of names containing 'y de'
Ignore spelling of 'los'/'las' in proper nouns
Ignore spelling of text in LATEX
how high can birds fly (birds -> NNS)
ignore spelling of things like REMOTE_USER and name@company
I in I/O is no PRP
